name: CS2 Schema Loader
description: Apply CS2 schema-system class layouts (from cs2-dumper output) as named user types in Binary Ninja, so client.dll/server.dll/etc. show real schema names + field offsets.
longdescription: Reads cs2-dumper's generated headers (output/<module>.hpp + <module>.json) and registers each schema class as a named user type. Inheritance is preserved via a __base member, enums become typed enums, and field types parsed from the // type comments map onto Source 2 primitives, CHandle<T>, CUtlVector<T>, etc. Run via Plugins > CS2 Schema > Apply Schemas From cs2-dumper.
author: internal
